calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>provides that a party may file a motion alleging that another party knowingly falsified certain information for the purpose of obtaining a protective order;<hr><ltbullet>allows a court to sanction a party after determining whether a party knowingly falsified certain information for the purpose of obtaining a protective order;<hr><ltbullet>addresses make-up parent-time when a parent has been denied parent-time due to the other parent's falsification of certain information for the purpose of obtaining a protective order; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
